which types of drugs are 
covered on this tier of the formulary. 

A tier may include multiple drug types. The amount of the outlier portion of the PPS payment for 
capital. 

This is one component of the total amount that is payable for capital PPS for the claim. The total 
capital amount, which includes this variable, is in the variable CLM_TOT_PPS_CPTL_AMT. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: GAP_DRUG_TYPE_TIER_07 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 6 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files) 

VALUES: Binary character string
